author: 0xrubo
content: it's under `engine_newPayloadWithWitness` but i believe we should support v5. cc <@277500722655002624>

author: jsign
content:
Yep, must be named `engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5` for working in Hive.
And ideally also support `engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV4` (Osaka) to be able to run the cross-fork boundary cases if possible.

author: __flcl
content: We did not add version postfixes, seems reasonable to have em, let us add it soon. Just need to be sure no one already consumes `engine_newPayloadWithWitness`
